title: [codereview] coap_status.c has excessive comments violating no-comments rule
description: coap_status.c contains many /* */ and // comments and doxygen blocks beyond SPDX. Per task, strip all non-SPDX comments. Zephyr style prefers minimal docs in .c files.
close_reason: Fixed in pass3: capacity BUILD_ASSERTs, strict checks, comment stripping per task
